_note: Real per-season data, 1998-2025 (the computed wheel floor is 1998). Sources by span: pittsburghpanthers.com official Sidearm stats (2013-2025); the Wayback-archived official CollegeSports-era cumulative pages (1999, 2001-2004 full offense+defense; the 2005-06 capture is MID-SEASON and deliberately unused; the 2000 page was never archived - a one-year defense hole covered by adjacent years); Sports-Reference (offense 1998+, full defense 2005-2012, and gap-heals for seasons the official payloads omit or mislink, each verified against SR). Per-player defense for 1994-1997 exists ONLY in the digitized Pitt media guides at digital.library.pitt.edu (objects pitt:31735062136191/-183/-175 and pitt:31735038318758), which sit behind a human-verification wall automated tooling cannot pass - when those pages are retrieved manually, parse them and the data-driven wheel floor extends toward 1994 automatically. Coarse roster codes (DL/DB) were resolved player-by-player with citations; SR offense-table position guesses are never trusted for defenders. QB rushYds is the NCAA net. redshirtYears is coverage bookkeeping, not verified biography. honors[] is per-season, award-first (official Pitt media-guide honorees list + Wikipedia per-year All-America/ACC-season articles + conference award pages), with the attach step skipping honors whose season has no stat row (2000-hole honorees noted in the ledger).
